name: Chili Blanco Especial
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in water to cover for 24 hours; drain.
2. In a crock pot or large kettle, combine the beans, 5 ¼ cups chicken broth, garlic, onion, white pepper, salt, oregano, cumin, and cloves. Simmer covered for at least 5 hours until the beans are tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the green chilies, diced chicken, and 1 ¾ cups chicken broth. For a hotter taste, add jalapeno. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
4. To serve, place one flour tortilla in each bowl. Spoon in chili and serve with all condiments for a very special chili.
